summary: Modular routes refactoring test complete. All 38 backend tests pass. Routes from auth.py, users.py, wallet.py, admin.py, and referral.py are properly registered and working.

minor.issue: Registration fails with 500/520 error when mobile is null due to MongoDB unique index on mobile field causing DuplicateKeyError. This is a DB schema issue, not a route issue.
minor.recommendation: Consider making mobile index a sparse index or handle null mobile case in registration

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 router modules (auth.py, users.py, wallet.py, admin.py, referral.py) are properly extracted and integrated
Database references are correctly passed via set_db() functions for each router
Helper functions are properly injected via set_helpers() for routes that need them
All routers are properly mounted to the api_router with correct prefixes
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from query projections or handled by Pydantic models
Wallet route returns prc_balance with full precision while dashboard rounds to 4 decimal places - minor inconsistency
